title: backend: Reject unsupported Jaeger tracing endpoint
author: harrshita123

findings.description: Commit subject missing SubArea. Expected: 'backend: telemetry: Reject unsupported Jaeger endpoint; add --jaeger-endpoint flag'.

Pre-existing logic issue in 'at least one exporter' check: condition fires when StdoutTraceEnabled is true (meaning stdout IS configured), so the error can never actually fire when intended. Suggest a follow-up issue.
Extracting validateTracing() as a helper improves readability before adding Jaeger-specific validation.
--jaeger-endpoint flag description 'Jaeger collector endpoint (unsupported; use otlp-endpoint)' surfaces the deprecation clearly at startup.
